programmes.show_description: This channel is currently off air.
Comment and analysis on the big stories of the day in Ireland and abroad with a panel of guests covering the key issues. (HD)
The hospital faces an outbreak of a major infectious disease causing panic in the community, and Dr Ormerod and Dr Weatherill must confront a personal crisis. (HD)
One of Leinster's brightest young prospects, Ian McKinley's life was rocked when he lost sight in his eye with a horrific rugby injury. (HD)

Paul McGrath played at three major tournaments throughout Ireland's golden era. He relives a club and international career and his battles on and off the field. (HD)

A lively mix of celebrity chat with national and international guests, fabulous food from the country's top Chefs, expert advice and all the unmissable stories making the headlines (HD)
Ainsley is joined by Yvonne Cobb, deaf celebrity chef and founder of Yumma Food, and Dr Rupy Aujla, GP and creator of The Doctor's Kitchen. (HD)
